question.label: School energy
question.name: What part of school has been giving you the most energy lately?
question.description: Finds the work or moments that are genuinely motivating, beyond a generic check-in.

answer: playground and football pitch and playing basket ball

assessment.note: Named active play at the playground, football pitch, and basketball as the energising parts of school, showing strong engagement and a modest wellbeing lift.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Support from manager
new_queue.name: What would make these check-ins more useful for you?

new_queue.label: Learning stretch
new_queue.name: Where at school are you getting pushed in a good way?

new_queue.label: Peer connection
new_queue.name: Who at school do you feel most connected to lately?

new_queue.label: Next stretch
new_queue.name: What would feel like a real step up for you over the next few weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: fine, it's a few hours and there is time after school to do stuff. and i don't have much home work. i'd like more ECA's - i only do mondays
playground and football pitch and playing basket ball
Getting to school took a long time, the BTS saw slow and very busy.
